Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x3A34 "SUPACATCHATROOPA-C000-3A34" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $c000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Supa Catcha Troopa.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This game has a BASIC program to provide instructions before the main game loads. Therefore an init routine has been added at $C000 which: 1. Sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers. 2. Executes the RUN command to start the command to start the intro program.
Note: The SYS 11000 statement on line number 110 of the BASIC intro program has been changed to SYS 14900 so as to jump to the entry point of $3A34 once the intro has finished.
